description: Schema contains a 'pattern' regex with exponential backtracking (e.g., ^(a+)+$ against aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaX). Evaluating this regex pins a CPU forever; SDK MUST use a non-backtracking engine (re2) or per-pattern timeout.
rationale: Schema-compile bounds: compiled-schema keyword count <= 10 000, patterns evaluated via re2 OR per-pattern timeout, per-manifest validation budget <= 250 ms. Without these, a 'valid' schema with catastrophic backtracking is a DoS vector.
